Diamond/Pearl Gym Leaders & Elite Four

	Following the tried-and-tested Pokémon formula, in Diamond/Pearl you battle your way through 8 gyms, each specialising in a particular type. Following that you take on the Elite Four and the Champion.

### Gym Leaders
[Roark](#gym-1) (Oreburgh City)[Gardenia](#gym-2) (Eterna City)[Maylene](#gym-3) (Veilstone City)[Crasher Wake](#gym-4) (Pastoria City)[Fantina](#gym-5) (Hearthome City)[Byron](#gym-6) (Canalave City)[Candice](#gym-7) (Snowpoint City)[Volkner](#gym-8) (Sunyshore City)
### Elite Four
[Aaron](#elite4-1)[Bertha](#elite4-2)[Flint](#elite4-3)[Lucian](#elite4-4)[Cynthia](#champion-5)
